programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Casey Chameleon joins Elmo, Gabrielle, and Grover's game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Doesn't Want to Miss Out
programme.desc: Daniel has to go potty, but is worried there won't be space for his sea turtle on the class mural when he's done in the bathroom.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas are reading a story about a bunyip and hear some strange noises. They think a real bunyip has come to visit. They search for it but in the end find that it was Tolstoy making the noises.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat boasts about his prowess on the sporting field so Lulu challenges him to a running race with B1. During the race, Lulu and the Bananas play a trick on Rat by disguising B2 as B1 and substituting him during the race.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Coco's showing Bing how magnets work. While Coco builds her tower, Bing looks for more magnetic things in the garden. Bing accidentally drops the magnet behind the flowerbed, so Flop introduces them to magnetic fishing.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds ride through the mountains on a real steam train and learn how water powers a locomotive! No lions allowed!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Worms inside help make the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: John, Evie, Caterina and Captain are enjoying playtime with their Wiggly dolls, but there is a problem: their dolls are feeling tired and sore. Will Dr Lynn Burr be able to make the dolls feel better?

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.sub-title: The Pop Lock and Ya Go Stop
programme.desc: Are you ready to Pop Lock and Ya Go Stop? Kaeng shows us some cool dance moves to a brand-new funky track. Come pop and lock and groove along to Go And Stop!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Who is Paddington's Special Visitor that Jonathan and Judy have helped come from afar?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Squirrel Hotpot
programme.desc: When Mr Tod catches Squirrel Nutkin and takes him to Owl Island, it falls to Peter, Lily, Benjamin and the other squirrels to save Nutkin from being turned into a Squirrel Hotpot dinner.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: The PJs offer Armadylan a chance to try out for the hero team, but he's worried his clumsy strength will make it fail... so with Luna Girl's urging, he reluctantly reinvents himself as \.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A lost bird needs Mojo, and Bo's hang glider, to help it get home!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Vida's vet bag goes missing, she and her Sweetwoodian friends need to track it down!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Por Por's plane to Australia gets cancelled Penny doesn't feel like celebrating Chinese Moon Festival. To cheer Penny up, Flower learns how to make Por Por's famous Moon Cakes, with an imaginary trip to the moon.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, Suzy and Granny Pig are visiting Grandpa Pig in the hospital today. After the Doctor's assessment, it is decided that he is now well enough to go home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When dad shows the kids how to use their old baby-harness, a new game is born: Dad Baby! But dad is unprepared for the harsh realities of giving birth to a baby Bingo.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Split chases a glowing Chillipede into the depths of the Spooky Forest and gets lost inside an overgrown tree-root maze, where the only way out is to follow the sounds of Ginger and the other Baby Pea-Rexes.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Big Trev tells Pounce and Gemma a tale from his childhood as they wait for his elderly turtle friend, Salty, to arrive.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel misses dinner with her dad.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Lion's Mane Jellyfish
programme.desc: An enormous lion's mane jellyfish gets its amazingly long tentacles tangled in the Octopod's engine while Tweak is working on it.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.sub-title: The Pop Lock and Ya Go Stop
programme.desc: Are you ready to Pop Lock and Ya Go Stop? Kaeng shows us some cool dance moves to a brand-new funky track. Come pop and lock and groove along to Go And Stop!

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Michelle and Rachael discover where Machu Pichu is found on a world globe; Rachael meets Hansel and Victor, a zampona and a charango player, who play Peruvian music and teach Rachael a dance.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The bream has gone missing from the fish counter at the Wholefish Cafe and Detective James is determined to crack The Case of the Missing Fish.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Glitch builds a stink-making machine to wreak havoc on afternoon tea with Nana, while Squash tries to cheer Jeremy up with silly antics.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus making lots of bubbles, so many they spread all around town.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Dancing Party
programme.desc: The family are having a dancing party to show off their special dance moves, but Nikhil hasn't got one! Will he be able to find an original move?

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: After cleaning up the greenhouse with Grandma Nell, Elmo, Gabrielle, and Tango head home for the night. There's just one thing... they aren't ready yet!

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: When Pants finds mysterious gifts just for him, he searches everywhere for Mittens so he can share the news with his best friend. But where is she?!

programme.title: Guess How Much I Love You
programme.desc: The summer meadow is home to many amazing treasures of nature. When Little Nutbrown Hare finds a beautiful blue butterfly, he and Little Field Mouse go on a hunt for other blue treasures.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups wonder what it would be like to be superheroes so mix up an adventure to be real superheroes with real powers.

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie visits the doctor to understand why he feels unwell and learns how to take his medicine properly.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds discover some of the clever things that happen on railways! Two passenger trains become one in a faraway railway station, and then they see how freight trains move giant boxes all around the country!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: It's snowing outside so Nim has to keep herself busy indoors. She makes a spoon bat picture, an eggbox whale and a Swiss roll sausage dog to keep her company.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Evie, Anthony, and Paloma the Mermaid are in the Wiggly Kitchen; a singalong to This Old Man; a visit the Dancing Water Police of Wiggle Town to solve their problem.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy is giving a talk on flying insects. Mr Hammond asks him to pay special attention to where the damselfly lays its eggs. Andy heads to the South of France and manages to find a pregnant damselfly.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Fabio's sticky sauce gets him stuck to Mojo. Is there really no way to un-stick them?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are painting. Daddy shows Peppa and George how to mix paints and the three of them paint a beautiful picture of a cherry tree in the garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has built a little train and takes Peppa and George for a ride. Along the way they meet their friends and there's room for everyone aboard. Peppa and George think it's the best train in the whole world!

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou take shelter from the rain and Kiri tells a story in which nothing really happens.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Gingers tells the Pea-Rexes that she has a delicious treat for them - a hearty breakfast of yummy drops except there is a twist. Ginger has hidden the drops and they have to go on a treasure hunt to find them!

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Snobby King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit the Little Kingdom, and Holly and her mummy and daddy enlist the Elf Band to impress them.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Zigzag's lucky trainers pinch her toes, Vida to get her back on track for the Sweetwood Relay!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Triggs sings about one of his favourite places in the whole world - the dog park, as he and Maddie help a nervous newcomer to find her feet and reclaim her roar.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Triggs' favourite teddy is a bit stinky and needs a wash, but poor Triggs is worried and doesn't want to let go. Can Maddie help reassure him that everything will be okay?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Everyone wants Stanley's help. Myrtle to make pancakes, Jose to unpack boxes, Peggy to tidy her tree house and Ari to do groovy moves for the dance class. Stanley invents three Can Bots to help.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Dwarf Lanternshark
programme.desc: Down in the darkness of the ocean deep, Peso and the Octonauts must help a tiny, injured Dwarf Lanternshark. But they have to find him first.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJs are desperate to get their vehicles back from Carly and Cartoka, but are having trouble taming their Crystal Animals to help them - and to make matters worse, PJ Robot is kidnapped as the battery.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is painting the clubhouse. The squirrels ask if they can help too, but they have some different colours in mind and - with the help of Tino the artistic mouse - some new painting techniques to throw in the mix.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Big Trev tells Pounce and Gemma a tale from his childhood as they wait for his elderly turtle friend, Salty, to arrive.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A hunt for dinosaur bones leads to a search and rescue mission with the Police Helicopter, FireSwift, Radar and Shadow.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lying Fox
programme.desc: When Mr Tod is trapped in Mr McGregor's garden, Peter reluctantly agrees to help him escape, but soon learns that you should never trust a fox!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers find two chirping crickets one evening on Sesame Street, they wonder if the insects are communicating with each other.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel and Miss Elaina are so excited to visit Ducky at the Neighbourhood farm, but when they arrive, she isn't there.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Mysterious footprints and a visit from a spaceship inspire today's makes: aliens made from plates and from salad and a theatre for spoon puppets.

programme.title: Play School: Let the Games Begin
programme.desc: The toys, Little Ted and Kiya, perform impressive rhythmic gymnastics routines. Matt joins Paralympian Dylan Alcott for a game of wheelchair basketball.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Sing along to 'Lucia the Koala', join Captain Feathersword's picnic with Wags, and laugh with Lachy and Tsehay's jokes!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Rajiv learns that he can be really useful with or without his crown.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is excited about the marbles competition at school, but an accident with Bobby causes her mood to sour after the marbles scatter around the room.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and her friends are disappointed to find the playground closed for construction. Unsure what to do next, the gang climb the sand dunes, looking for the desert oasis.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When Ginger gets a nasty tummy ache, the Pea-Rexes have to find a special soothing herb which unfortunately is in the middle of Bananaraptor Island.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Puddle Jump Jete? Takaya is practising ballet. Plie and jete along to Ballet Song and learn how to be a ballet dancer too!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back in time 220 million years, to the time of cynodont, a dog-like furry creature with excellent eyesight and a powerful sense of smell.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. But the stones are very big, and it will take more than Mojo's crane top to move them!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Jewels visits and copies everything Ariel does.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star in school for drawing a wonderful picture of her house.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things. There is Mr Bull's Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen, and even a very special appearance from Mr Potato.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie + Triggs sneak and creak their way past Mum and Dad's bedroom in search of a tasty treat, only to discover they may not be the only ones searching for a midnight feast.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan finds a treasure map in a bottle on the beach. Could it really lead to finding the lost treasure of dread pirate Abby Birdy?

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Gherkinn's family visits Kangaroo Beach, eager to see their heroic lifeguard son in action! But when they arrive, they discover GhA\.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Porcupine Puffer
programme.desc: Barnacles, Kwazii and Peso venture back inside a whale shark to retrieve a porcupine puffer fish that was accidentally swallowed.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Rhino gets ahold of White Tiger's gem and causes animal trouble in the city.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream, but they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Por Por's plane to Australia gets cancelled Penny doesn't feel like celebrating Chinese Moon Festival. To cheer Penny up, Flower learns how to make Por Por's famous Moon Cakes, with an imaginary trip to the moon.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Dad has left Cosima in charge for the day. It seems like an excellent opportunity to have a massive party! What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are working together to find Enid when they notice that she is at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly want to play with Gaston the ladybird but he is missing. Nanny Plum uses her magic crystal ball to retrace Gaston's steps and find his whereabouts.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: When Superbuns is partnered with a snail for Track and Field day, it's her kindness that helps them win.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Bam must lead a new super vehicle team consisting of Nightbike, Goldie, Grundy, and Kitty after the Legion of Zoom traps the rest of the Batwheels in the Batcave.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the grannies' house to mum. But Janet and Rita don't want to move out.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer's Dad comes to stay but he isn't too impressed the way his son and Shaun are running the flock.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Sora's invention complicates Lloyd and Wildfire's effort to free the dragons, while Sora escapes the lab in search of Riyu, who's missing.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A High-Pitched Buzz and Training Wheels
programme.desc: Sheldon dismantles the refrigerator to stop an annoying hum; and then must get a paper route to pay for the repairs.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Rival Prodigy And Sir Isaac Neutron
programme.desc: When Dr. Sturgis bonds with Paige, another ten-year-old genius, Sheldon's jealousy leads Meemaw to intervene; Meanwhile, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date.

programme.title: Ultimate Vets
programme.desc: Rory tackles a tricky operation on a greedy cat, Cheryl carries out life changing facial surgery on a Bull Mastiff and Cat helps Reggie the rat who's feeling under the weather.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: It's a momentous day in Wolf Wood after a turbulent year, having selected an appropriate female, Meg, to be the matriarch and today a new male arrives, Terry. Megan has her first up-close experience with an aardvark.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: A feud is brewing in the meerkat enclosure and it's a family affair. Meerkats live in strict hierarchical groups and elderly female Cassie, appears to have been ousted by her daughter, Harley.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: As Morgause and her inhuman knights attack a helpless Camelot, Merlin's loyalties are stretched to the limit.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve is in Sao Paulo with a plague of deadly yellow scorpions and sets out to the mysterious and remote Snake island where the snake count is higher than anywhere on earth.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Nadia Chamack is akumatised into Prime Queen. Armed with her smartwatch, she wants to force Ladybug and Cat Noir to admit that they're in love on live TV to make the ratings skyrocket. Our heroes can't let her steal the show.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: After accidentally swallowing a piece of gum, Owen has to protect his friends by jumping into a gum volcano.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Chloe, a child prodigy finds it difficult to connect with her much older classmates. The Bears take her under their wing, showing her how to make great college friends.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Chloe's professor is too mean to give her any face time to talk over her poor grade.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Baby Grizz lives on the set of a sitcom in which he stars.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears and Squatter Otter crash a couple's swanky pad while they're out of town.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Despair Redux! The Return of the Evil Emperor, Frieza!
programme.desc: The members of the Frieza Force have slowly been gathering to seek revenge for their fallen leader. While Goku and Vegeta train, Sorbet and his men head to Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: A Warning From Jaco! Frieza And 1,000 Soldiers Close In
programme.desc: Frieza plans his revenge against Goku and Earth, but when he learns how strong Goku has become, he begins training. After four months, he's finally ready to attack.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When a monster ruins their relaxing vacation, the Girls run into a familiar face.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Internationals is right around the corner, and the new Dance Captain of A-Troupe has a huge first move to make.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: From how Henry VIII had the most comfortable poo possible, to finding out which bit of his house Charles Dickens called The Demon - take a tour of horrible homes through history.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Misplaced Mug
programme.desc: Mr McGillick is upset after he loses his precious 'World's Best Principal' mug, so Ezra makes it his personal mission to get it back.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive tells Otto the story of what happened to Octavia's partner, Agent Oz.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Ms O and her team will stop at nothing to win their very first Jackie Award.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi help a scrapper repair her droid.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Owlette takes offence when Romeo scoffs at the power of her feathers.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Yong Bao tells Thomas the story of how he came to have a magnificent tiger emblem on his tender.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Periwinkle wanders off during a mission in the Bialowieza Forest in Poland and discovers a rare European Bison stranded and hurt.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Wandy gets a cold and is taken ill. Holly is given a replacement wand. This new wand can do lots of things that Wandy can't, and soon becomes the favourite.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Abby, and The Count are playing a game of hide-and-seek in The Count's Castle to find all ten Batty Bats and round them up for their nap time.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Prince Wednesday needs to get dressed before he can go outside to see the butterflies and play with Chrissie.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat decides to make a home video of life in Cuddles Avenue. He enlists the help of the Bananas and the Teddies but has a frustrating time. The Bananas can't even get the tripod to work and the Teddies get starry eyes.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Amy and Morgan buy new yoyos from Rat's shop. When LuLu goes to buy one, Rat has run out of them. The Bananas offer to make LuLu a yoyo. It is not as easy as they thought and in the process end up making a diabolo.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula are looking for items to sell when they find Mr Rainybow without his head. A lady buys his stacky bit for her toilet rolls, but when they look for more to sell they find Mr Rainybow's head.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Ruff ruff! Did you know, dogs have their own doctors called vets and sometimes they even have jobs? See what it takes to be a police dog - a very important job, indeed.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa. The little boys don't want to play the same games as Peppa and Suzy, so they all play jumping up and down in muddle puddles.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join Anthony on a musical adventure as he rocks and plays his guitar! The Wiggles love music and it's time for a music lesson. Join Caterina, Tsehay, and Simon who are experts at replicating instrument sounds.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Quick Tap? Abi's got some colourful socks on to help her dance from her head to her toes! Tap and clap along to Heads and Shoulders, Knees and Toes.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: It's the last night of Hanukkah and Mr Gruber's Hanukkiah breaks before he can light the final candle, how can another be found in time?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Scare Owl
programme.desc: When Peter uses a model owl to scare off Old Brown, he ends up scaring the squirrels too.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: When paired for hero duty with Armadylan, Bastet assumes he is an evil armadillo from ancient Egypt come to hunt her down and Armadylan must desperately try to prove his innocence!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: The clock tower is missing a hand, and detectives Mojo and Bo are on the case!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Tidbit sprains his ankles before his dance performance. Fergie teaches him wheelchair dance moves.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Unicorn Cuzzy loses her beanie, her unicorn spark disappears! Flower and Flour chip in to help her retrace her steps and find it before she loses her unicorn-ness forever!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: For Penny's birthday Peppa and friends are trying out ice hockey! At first, they find it difficult but eventually everyone gets a hang of it and the birthday is a success!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes go on an underwater adventure inside a rubbery bubble made by a young and friendly Watermelonsuchus, but things take a turn when the Bananaraptors get involved.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On a paddle board expedition, the cadets get 'stranded' on a desert island. Meanwhile, Neville goes on a journey to become the ultimate balance master.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Jewels visits and copies everything Ariel does.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Urchin Invasion
programme.desc: Kelp-eating red sea urchins attack a kelp forest. The Octonauts are helped by Shellington's sister, Pearl, another sea otter and a scientist.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Quick Tap? Abi's got some colourful socks on to help her dance from her head to her toes! Tap and clap along to Heads and Shoulders, Knees and Toes.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Hunter and Luke give homes to their animal creations and use a world globe to discover where they are usually found; Luke makes some chia puddings with some yummy runny maple syrup.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: It's the Pontypandy Animal Parade at Annie's Farm and Peter and Norman want to join in by rounding Lambikins and Woolly.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The spies are excited for a family vacation, but when Silver Paw tries to ruin it by shutting off Dad's alarm, Jeremy sneaks out of the suitcase to save the holiday.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley, Sophie and Benjamin make a 'Dino-Pirate' float for the carnival.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Imaginary Friends
programme.desc: When Nikhil is too busy to play with him, Jay creates a new imaginary friend. Nikhil makes one up too and they compete to find out which one is the best!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: The trees in the park are turning bare and there's a chill in the air - it's winter on Sesame Street, and Gabrielle is getting ready for a family vacation somewhere warm.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: It seems like all the animals in Kibble Corners are perfectly suited for their jobs, but Mittens isn't sure what kind of job she wants to do.

programme.title: Guess How Much I Love You
programme.desc: Trying to keep cool on a summer's day by the stream, Little Nutbrown Hare and Big Nutbrown Hare have lots of fun throwing sticks. When Little Nutbrown Hare discovers that sticks float, they follow the sticks down the river.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: When Pockets builds a den, Spin and Giggle want one too. The Mixmups mix up a Den Building adventure to build their own Dens.

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie learns all steps of making pancakes from finding the kitchen equipment to the best part: dressing and eating.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the grannies' house to mum. But Janet and Rita don't want to move out.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds meet a bee and follow it home to it's hive! They watch bees collect nectar, make honey, protect the hive, and care for babies - all in their buzzing bee kingdom.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: After watching her favourite movie about wizards, Nim decides to make a magical Makery tree, an ice cream wizard's hat and a pirate ship.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Tsehay and Henry the Octopus are in the Wiggly Kitchen where there are so many amazing musical sounds, great for salsa practice. Tsehay and Henry also find a blue teddy bear painting.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy is put in charge of caring for the frogspawn of the glass frog, but he has no idea how to look after it! So he embarks on a trip to Costa Rica in search of some wild glass frogs.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Didi the tractor is acting strangely, and super secret spies Mojo and Bo are on the case!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting their big cousin, Chloe. Today is a special day because Peppa and George are meeting Chloe's new baby brother, Alexander, for the first time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are going for a cycle ride. Peppa loves cycling downhill but she's not so keen on peddling uphill. Then they meet Peppa's friends and decide to have a race.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Lou sings a song about a flower, while Kiri's big pet rock Rockaroonie is rolling down the hill towards him. Can Kiri stop the rock in time?

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: The innocent looking Dragonfruitflyus has a cheeky habit of mimicking the noises of other Vegesaurs, so when the baby Pea-Rexes catch on they can't help but turn it into a competition.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Things are going missing all over the Little Kingdom - Holly has lost her wand and Ben has lost his horn! Soon they realise that ants are stealing their things, and try to persuade the Queen Ant to give them back.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Birdie is always out of breath. Vida helps him manage his asthma AND perform the coolest dance ever!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While helping Nana to prune Mum's tree, Maddie is shocked to learn that this means cutting off all its branches! But as always, Dado has a few crafty surprises up his sleeve.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie + Triggs are intrigued when Mum suggests they use the microwave to cook dinner; can this singing robot microwave really make a healthy meal that's delicious and nutritious?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley up to make a bike lane. Can Do! However, when surveying the area, Stanley notices a despondent Sophie without her dino costume as she's waiting for it to dry.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Pirate Parrotfish
programme.desc: When the Octonauts go on a pirate treasure hunt, along the way Kwazii meets the perfect sidekick - a Parrotfish!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJs get caught up in a battle between Romeo and the twins.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: It's time for a Squirrel Clubhouse Spring Clean. Duggee is dusting when the doorbell goes and a big package arrives for him. What is it? Duggee has bought an amazing new hoover, but yikes. It's very powerful.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On a paddle board expedition, the cadets get 'stranded' on a desert island. Meanwhile, Neville goes on a journey to become the ultimate balance master.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: As Norman leaves the house, the giant hat he made for the Pontypandy Hat Parade gets stuck in the door, just as the sitting room goes up in flames.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of Nutkin on the Run
programme.desc: When Squirrel Nutkin angers Old Brown by taking his glasses, it's up to Peter and his friends to put things right.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers are playing an alphabet game, they wonder if they can continue the game by finding animals in nature that begin with the letters of their first names.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: When Daniel wants to play a game with Mum Tiger outside, he's upset that she is giving Margaret all of her attention.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim is trying to read, but gets distracted by The Makery's ideas: a salad bowl dinosaur, a puffed rice monster and an apple maggot costume.

programme.title: Play School: Let the Games Begin
programme.desc: Leah and Teo have fun outside playing backyard games! The toys, Maurice and Owl, compete in a sack race. Leah and Teo race in an obstacle course of their own making?

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Tsehay has fruit in her hat and Lucia has ribbons in her plaits as the Wiggles sing the catchy 'Fruitie In My Hat'! Meanwhile, Lachy helps Simon turn folding laundry into a fun activity.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: After Tish gets her kite stuck high up in a tree, Tash suggests they go and find a dinosaur to help them get it back.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and Bobby are playing with building blocks in Bobby's bedroom, but Rosa is displeased at the mess they've made.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger encounters an injured Mamma Pea-Rex who quickly befriends the baby Pea-Rexes. Ginger goes off to play alone and lands herself in trouble but is rescued by some unexpected friends.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wiggly Wave? Emma and Kaeng make a splash as they wiggle and jiggle along to Wiggerly Woo. Wiggle along any way you like!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy Day travels back in time 127 million years to the time of the Iguanodon - a plant-eating dinosaur that moved in herds - to make a plaster copy of one of its footprints.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo help Preston pretend to be a famous famous character with some very demanding fans!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Sebastian tries to relax for a day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream, but they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa takes Goldie the fish for a visit to the vets, she is surprised when she finds that there's a new road to be built over the building.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family have all gone to the caves for a day out, and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide. Peppa and George are excited to see the pretty caves and go through the underground lakes.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie + Triggs are baking a cake for Granny, but when the recipe goes missing they are forced to mix it up and add some surprising new ingredients that are quite simply bonkers!

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.sub-title: Bats the Way I Like It
programme.desc: The bats that nest in Grandad's shed each year are missing. Can Stan and Gran encourage these nocturnal creatures to return when they can't hear them?

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Charlie and Bronwyn take the kids on a sailing lesson, Charlie feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. As Charlie tries to win back the kids' attention, he ends up sinking the boat.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Neville convinces the lifeguards to purchase a new Robo-Dummy 3000. But when 'Robo-Dotty' goes rogue, enforcing extreme rules, it's up to the cadets to get things back under control.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Scared Sperm Whale
programme.desc: A timid sperm whale must conquer his fears and dive deep down to help the Octonauts release Peso from a giant clam.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: The Spidey bots help Team Spidey defeat Doc Ock's plans to launch a rocket.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Unicorn Cuzzy loses her beanie, her unicorn spark disappears! Flower and Flour chip in to help her retrace her steps and find it before she loses her unicorn-ness forever!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima and Big Lizard investigate the cause of Dad's mysterious sleepwalking in an adventure that takes them around Proxima and right back home again.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels discover the wonderful world of accessorising.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle wants a boiled egg for his breakfast but Mr Elf has forgotten to bring him one. The elves decide to deliver the king chickens from the Elf Farm so he can have an egg whenever he likes!

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Neville's working on building his next big thing. But when Superbuns realises Neville's plan is doomed she finds a way to help.

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: Traditional Owners Connie and her granddaughter, Gleesyanna, take Clarence on a journey through Kakadu's incredible plant life and introduce him to the six seasons of Kakadu.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad to play two different games, so Dad plays both at the same time.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun makes a wish that changes everything, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Nash's Jedi friends set out to find her missing speeder.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Hap's kitchen is overrun by creatures.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.sub-title: A Haunt Of A Thousand Voices!
programme.desc: Daphne takes the rest of the gang to meet her friend, famous voice over actor Frank Welker.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy recruit mercenaries and mad scientists to help them steal a spaceship out from under the nose of Task Force X!

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Every BattleBot has the same goal: to qualify for a place in the Top 32. With just three short fights to impress the selection committee, the pressure is already mounting.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: In the last of the quarter-finals, Contenders battle Gladiators for a place in the semis.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When the Great Dragon attacks Camelot, Merlin must go on an epic journey to find the one man who can defeat the monster.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Gabbi Bolt Meets Cursed Hagrid in HP1!
programme.desc: Gabbi Bolt joins Gem for a Harry Potter throwback! The Resetters take on Mario Kart, some alternatives if you've played too much Splatoon and an Ultrahand disaster in Level Up Kitchen!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Legendary Parisian ice-cream maker Andre gets akumatised by Hawk Moth. Now Glaciator, he turns people into ice cream, which starts to melt. Ladybug and Cat Noir cannot get cold feet if they want to stop him.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Chef warns Beth and Cody that making goofy faces into a mirror will cause them to get stuck that way. It turns out he was right, just not in the way any of them ever imagined.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: You know that one annoying friend who just can't get the hint? That's Charlie, and he's Bigfoot. The Bears meet Charlie when he signs up on a home-sharing website to spend a weekend with the Bears.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Charlie meets a creature just like him named Ralph.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz pitches his Crowbar Jones prequel film to Nom Nom.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears find themselves in a world of dog fighting planes and floating airships.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The Start Of Vengeance! The Frieza Force's Malice Strikes Gohan!
programme.desc: Gohan and the remaining Z fighters are ready to face Frieza. Up against 1000 troops and the emperor of evil, our heroes may face more of a challenge than expected.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Change! An Unexpected Return! His Name Is Ginyu!!
programme.desc: Tagoma proves to be a tough opponent and even Piccolo can't take him. Gotenks joins the battle but suddenly Tagoma is taken over by Ginyu. Gohan is able to face him but can he keep up when Frieza makes his move?

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Girls have to battle Him after he causes Bubbles' imagination to run wild.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Grace puts her plan in jeopardy when she tries to decide the Alternates on the behalf of Ariana. Meanwhile, Pete makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Sad Little Sister
programme.desc: Poppy loses her school hat and is forced to sit in the shelter shed, where Maudie discovers there may be more to the missing hat.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: From warring brothers to farting mothers, Horrible Histories presents some of the biggest, best and worst rivalries throughout time.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Ms O and Oscar accidentally switch bodies, Olive and Otto must set things right before the entire Odd Squad team find out what happened.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Ms O has bizarre side effects after being sprayed by a weird plant, Olive and Otto must travel around town finding the correct measurements of the ingredients for the medicine to cure her.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Nash and the Jedi must recover a ship stolen by Draiven.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Catboy wants to help solve a mystery, but Owlette and Gekko are only interested in his super speed.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: When storms carry sharks into the swamp they quickly claim it as their own, Paani, Kwazii and Ranger Marsh have to work together to break up the turf war and find a way for all the creatures to coexist.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The children are playing a game of superheroes. When Strawberry takes her super villain role a bit too far, it is up to the Elf Man and Fairy Girl to save the day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All of the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in the bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-Laa's ball is stuck, and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey.
